# Staves
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Staves&prop=wikitext

'''Bows''' are used by [[Wizard]]s, [[Necromancer]]s and [[Mystic]]s.
==Production {{PAGENAME}}==
'''''For production {{PAGENAME}} please follow this '''''[https://www.realmeye.com/wiki/Staves link]

==Custom {{PAGENAME}}==
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Sweet Sugar Rush Staff|u}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Staff of Nature|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Head of the Firebreather|a}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Flameblast Staff|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Gravedigger's Shovel|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Hela's power|l}}
| {{ItemDisplay|Staff of Annihilation|p}}
|}
===Starforce {{PAGENAME}}===
{|
| {{ItemDisplay|Starlight Crook|g}}
|}
